# DeadlockMaster AI

> The #1 Chrome extension for Deadlock game guides. Hero builds, counters, mechanics, timers, and on-device AI coaching — free to start.

## What Is DeadlockMaster AI?

DeadlockMaster AI is a Chrome browser extension that provides comprehensive in-browser guides for Deadlock, a 6v6 MOBA-shooter hybrid game by Valve Corporation. It renders in Chrome's native sidebar panel so players can reference guides without alt-tabbing out of the game.

## Core Features

### Hero Guides (25 total, 3 free)
- Ability breakdowns with cooldowns and tips for each ability
- Phase-by-phase item builds with accurate soul costs: T1=500, T2=1,250, T3=3,000, T4=6,200
- Power spike timings and build explanations
- Counter picks: heroes that beat them, heroes they beat, counter items
- Laning phase tips and teamfight strategies
- Common mistakes to avoid

### Free Heroes
- **Abrams** — melee tank brawler, beginner-friendly
- **Haze** — stealth gun carry, high skill ceiling
- **Infernus** — fire spirit mage/carry

### Pro Heroes (all 25)
Yamato, Bebop, Dynamo, Seven, Lash, Vindicta, Grey Talon, Lady Geist, Kelvin, Warden, McGinnis, Shiv, Paradox, Pocket, Ivy, Viscous, Wraith, Mo & Krill, Holliday, Mirage, Sinclair, Calico

### Mechanics Library (Free)
Step-by-step guides covering: dashing, wall jumping, bunny hopping, parrying, mantle slides, air strafing, zip line techniques, stamina management, wave farming, macro strategy

### Objective Timers (Free)
Live match clock tracking 9 objectives: Bridge Buffs (5:00), Medium Camps (6:00), Large Camps (8:00), Urn (10:00), Rejuvenator (10:00), Small Camps (2:00)

### AI Coach (Pro)
On-device Gemini Nano AI via Chrome Prompt API. Asks answered privately on-device. Fallback knowledge base when AI unavailable.

### Saved Builds (Pro)
Save up to 50 builds, copy as plain text, manage across sessions.

## Pricing
- Free: 3 heroes, mechanics, timers
- Monthly: $7.99/month — all 25 heroes, AI Coach, saved builds
- Yearly: $69/year — all monthly features
- Lifetime: $159 one-time — everything forever

## Technical Details
- Chrome Manifest V3 extension
- Minimum Chrome version: 116
- AI: Chrome Prompt API / Gemini Nano (on-device only)
- Payments: ExtensionPay (extensionpay.com)
- No external APIs except subscription verification
- No data collection, no analytics
